title: Nested Set Data Structure
scenario: Write a function in Python that creates a nested set data structure to store hierarchical data. The function should be named 'create_nested_set' and should take an array of objects as input. Each object should have an 'id', 'parent_id', and 'name' property. The output should be the nested set data structure.
constraints: Must be under 30 lines of code
Must use the 'self' keyword to access parent nodes

evaluationCriteria.description: Check if the code is syntactically correct and uses Python syntax.
Check if the code meets the constraints specified in the scenario.
Check if the code uses the 'self' keyword to access parent nodes.
Check if the code creates a nested set data structure.
